Describe the sequence of visual events from the opening text to the man using the spoon.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white text changes on an orange background; at 8s, a man in a tan shirt appears behind a counter; at 10s, his hands rest on a striped towel; at 12s, hands lift corners of a white cloth; at 16s, he holds a spoon over a small bowl.

question: Describe the actions performed by the person in the tan shirt regarding the items on the counter.
canonical_answer: At 0s, white text changes on an orange background; at 8s, a man stands in a kitchen with white cabinets; at 10s, he places hands on a towel with red stripes; at 16s, he holds a spoon above a bowl; at 18s, he positions the spoon over the striped cloth.
